title: Understanding Data Quality
text: Consider what makes data 'fit for use.' Think about accuracy, completeness, consistency, and timeliness. How do these aspects apply to the CustomerName and CustomerBirthDate fields?

title: Evaluating the Fields
text: Reflect on how errors in the CustomerName and CustomerBirthDate fields might affect the report. What kind of errors could occur, and how would they impact the report's reliability?

title: Defining Data Quality
text: Data quality is often defined by how well data serves its intended purpose. In this context, what purpose do the CustomerName and CustomerBirthDate fields serve in the report?

title: Identifying Key Aspects
text: Accuracy, completeness, consistency, and timeliness are key aspects of data quality.
